productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Pack of 3 Cream Socks
description: Pack of three socksIt's comfort unparalleled once you slip into these pairs of ribbed socks from United Colors of  Benetton. A glimpse of these socks from beneath a rolled up pair of jeans adds a hint of eccentricity to your classic style.Made of 73% cotton, 25% nylon and 2% elastaneOne pair of plain cream socksOne pair of beige socks with black stripesOne pair grey, cream and beige striped socksSock careMachine wash cold in not more than 30 degreesDo not dry cleanUse non-chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry lowDo not iron
